// note: Example config to consume code-rag's retrieval MCP from a coding agent (Claude Code / Codex / Cursor). The cost-showcase: the agent uses its own subscription instead of metered API tokens (ADR-006). This is the PRODUCT MCP (committed) — distinct from the kernel process-MCP (gitignored). For a copy-me quick-start see .mcp.json.example at the repo root. REQUIRES `npm run build` first: the bin runs from dist/. The dense (ONNX) leg is OFF by default here (unset CODE_RAG_DENSE) — the MCP runs BM25 + structural, fully offline and heat-safe. Add "CODE_RAG_DENSE": "true" to enable local ONNX dense recall (first tool call downloads the ~25MB MiniLM model); a whole-repo dense embed is refused at startup, so keep CORPUS_PATH scoped. CORPUS_PATH=`src` (the product source — excludes node_modules/web) so the first tool call indexes in seconds; CODE_RAG_INDEX persists that index so later runs are warm (FTR-57).
